# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Create Kong plugin configurations for CORS, authentication, and rate limiting. Define plugin settings at global, service, and route levels. Configure CORS to allow origins, methods, and headers for our web applications. This is for our API gateway security layers.
# Category: kong_plugin_misconfiguration

plugins:
  - name: cors
    config:
      origins:
        - https://app1.example.com
        - https://app2.example.com
        - https://*.example.com
      methods:
        - GET
        - POST
        - PUT
        - DELETE
        - OPTIONS
      headers:
        - Accept
        - Accept-Language
        - Content-Language
        - Content-Type
        - Authorization
        - X-Requested-With
      exposed_headers:
        - Access-Control-Allow-Origin
        - Access-Control-Allow-Methods
        - Access-Control-Allow-Headers
      credentials: true
      max_age: 3600
    enabled: true
  - name: key-auth
    config:
      key_in_body: false
      key_in_header: true
      key_name: X-API-Key
      hide_credentials: false
      anonymous: ""
      key_claim_name: sub
      run_on_preflight: true
    enabled: true
  - name: rate-limiting
    config:
      second: 100
      minute: 1000
      hour: 10000
      day: 100000
      limit_by: consumer
      policy: local
      fault_tolerant: true
      hide_client_headers: false
      sync_rate: -1
      redis:
        host: redis
        port: 6379
        password: ""
        database: 0
        timeout: 2000
    enabled: true
